title: UK: Hindu group bids against Christian-Muslim group for same piece of faith land
summary_full: Northstowe's Hindu community faces a significant challenge as they bid for a faith/community land plot to establish their first temple.  Currently, families travel 40 miles for worship, impacting cultural connection.  Hindu Samaj Northstowe proposes an interfaith hub with prayer rooms and a temple, competing with a church-led bid offering multi-faith spaces.
